y.distributed.client Class ThreadSynchronizer java.lang.Object ptolemy.distributed.client.ThreadSynchronizer public class ThreadSynchronizer extends java.lang.Object Synchronizes the access to the commandsMap. In order to allow parallel execution of

mandsMap. In order to allow parallel execution of commands, the ClientThreads that manage remote actors locally in the DistributedSDFDirector have to be able to access the commands without blocking the main execution Thread in a synchronized manne

the main execution Thread in a synchronized manner. Commands are represented by integers. It provides mechanisms to issue sets of commands and synchronize the access to those commands by the client Threads. It is assumed that no new set of comma

t Threads. It is assumed that no new set of commands is issued before the previous set of commands has been processed. Every ClientThread is responsible to set itself as ready after performing a command. Since: Ptolemy II 5.1 Version: $Id: ThreadS

ava.lang.Object key) Synchronizes access to the commands by the ClientThreads. They will block waiting for commands to be issued. Every time a command is fetched, it is removed from the commandsMap and all the waiting threads are notified. Para
